x-enum-comments.ACTIVE: ACTIVE allows full access (read, write, delete).
x-enum-comments.DISABLED: DISABLED denies all actions for the tenant.
x-enum-comments.LOCKED: LOCKED makes the tenant read-only (no writes or deletes).
x-enum-comments.WRITE_LOCKED: WRITE_LOCKED blocks writes but still allows reads and deletes.

x-enum-descriptions: DISABLED denies all actions for the tenant.
LOCKED makes the tenant read-only (no writes or deletes).
WRITE_LOCKED blocks writes but still allows reads and deletes.
ACTIVE allows full access (read, write, delete).
